annotationQueues.title: Annotation queues
annotationQueues.description: Manage annotation queues for data labeling

empty.title: No annotation queues yet
empty.description:
Get started by creating a queue for human review.
Organize traces and threads, label outputs, and gather feedback to improve performance.

noData.noQueuesYet: There are no annotation queues yet

dialog.annotationGuidelinesDescription: Set how items are scored and labeled, and provide instructions so annotators give consistent feedback.
dialog.annotatorsPerItemDescription: This sets the number of annotators required to score an item before it is marked as completed in the queue.
dialog.lockTimeoutDescription: How long an item stays reserved for an annotator while they are reviewing it. After this time, the item becomes available to other annotators. When multiple annotators are required, the item is only fully reserved once all annotator slots are occupied.
dialog.shareQueueDescription: You must invite annotators to your workspace for them to review the items. After creating the queue, you'll get a direct link to share with them.

deleteDialog.title: Delete annotation queue?
deleteDialog.description: Deleting an annotation queue will permanently remove it from the system. All associated data and configurations will be lost. This action can't be undone. Are you sure you want to continue?

batchDeleteDialog.title: Delete annotation queues
batchDeleteDialog.description: Deleting these annotation queues will permanently remove all associated annotations and reviews. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to continue?

toast.linkCopiedTitle: Annotation queue link copied to clipboard
toast.linkCopiedDescription: Share this queue with your annotators so they can start annotating and provide feedback to improve the evaluation of your LLM application.

instructions.noInstructions: No instructions were provided for this annotation queue

scores.commentsDescription: Text field for open feedback or additional notes.
